title: mimulus stellatus
intro: Mimulus stellatus, also known as the stellate monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae, native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mimulus stellatus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mimulus stellatus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
